title: Add lint warning on always_comb multidriven
body:
Hi, I noticed with Verilator 5.002 if I accidentally multi-drive a signal in my RTL with both an `assign` statement and `always_comb` block, there's no compiler warning/error. Example: 
`logic foo, bar;`
`assign foo = 1'b0;`
`always_comb foo = bar;`
Thank you
